extension.description: Intercepts video playback and requires a PIN to continue if the content rating is in your blocked list. Supports MPAA movie ratings (G through NR) and US TV ratings (TV-Y through TV-NR). Works with Umbrella, TMDbHelper, and any Kodi video source that passes rating metadata.
extension.news: 1.0.1 — Fix thread safety, TMDb IMDB ID lookup, and anonymous player instances. Upgrade settings to Kodi 21 format.
